ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 for deceased, 1 for survived) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 for first, 2 for second, 3 for third) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C for Cherbourg, Q for Queenstown, S for Southampton) */,
  "sex_binario" INTEGER /* Binary representation of gender (0 for male, 1 for female) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "passenger_type" TEXT /* Type of passenger (e.g., crew, first-time traveler, frequent traveler) */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name and contact information of an emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* List of medical conditions that might have affected survival */,
  "lifeboat_number" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if the passenger survived */,
  "rescue_location" TEXT /* Location where the passenger was rescued */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the passenger record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the passenger record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the port record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the port record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers in the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "binary_representation" INTEGER /* Binary representation of the gender (0 for male, 1 for female) */,
  "pronouns" TEXT /* Pronouns used for the gender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gender record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gender record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was booked */,
  "travel_agency" TEXT /* Travel agency that booked the ticket */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_details" (
  "cabin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger assigned to the cabin */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "cabin_features" TEXT /* Features of the cabin (e.g., window, balcony) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cabin record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cabin record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_details_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
